narrative:
Fairview Park-02-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 995 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.2 percentage points.
